title: CG Vyapam – Tracer – 35 Posts
shortInfo: The CG Vyapam Tracer Recruitment 2026 notification has been released for a total of 35 vacancies. The online application process will begin on 22 May 2026, and the last date to submit the application form is 15 June 2026.

basic_details.job_title: CG Vyapam Tracer Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for 35 Posts
basic_details.short_information: The CG Vyapam Tracer Recruitment 2026 notification has been released for a total of 35 vacancies. The online application process will begin on 22 May 2026, and the last date to submit the application form is 15 June 2026.
basic_details.organization_name: Office of the Chief Engineer, Water Resources Department (Jal Sansadhan Vibhag), Chhattisgarh, Nawa Raipur, Atal Nagar

age_limit.age_details: 45 years (all relaxations combined shall not result in age exceeding 45 years)

qualification.education_qualification: Must be obtained by the date of advertisement of the post (as per Schedule-III of the Chhattisgarh Jal Sansadhan (Arajapatrit Takniki) Seva Bharti Niyam, 2016).

selection_process: Written Competitive Examination (OMR-based) conducted by CG Vyapam
how_to_apply: Candidates shall apply online only through the CG Vyapam official website https://vyapamcg.cgstate.gov.in. Candidates applying for the first time must complete Profile Registration (Profail Panjikaran) on the Vyapam portal - once registered, personal details need not be re-entered for future exams. Detailed instructions on how to fill the form are available on the Vyapam website under "Instructions to fill the FORM" link. Candidates are advised to read the departmental recruitment rules carefully before applying.
seo_tags: Chhattisgarh Professional Examination Board Tracer Recruitment 2026
